_comment: Example codex-watch rules. Copy next to your repo as .codex-watch.json or into rules/local/<repo-name>.json. Every key is optional; omitted keys fall back to defaults.
_comment_agent_branch_prefixes: Branches that identify agent worktrees. Only matching worktrees are observed.
_comment_forbidden_paths: Globs the agent must never create or modify. Any match is a violation. `*` crosses directory separators.
_comment_banned_patterns: Regexes that must not appear in lines the agent ADDS (or anywhere in new files). Classic use: test-exclusion flags that mask regressions.
_comment_protected_lines: File + regex pairs. If a diff in that file touches a line matching the regex, it is a violation. Classic use: signing keys, version fields, wire-format constants.
_comment_watch_paths: Globs that are legitimate to edit but always worth reporting. Classic use: CI workflows, architecture decision records.
